changeSet.author: Eugene A. Kalosha
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO systems (id, organization_id, system_status, name, description, owner_id, infosec_focal_person_id, business_unit_id, data_asset_classification_id, number_of_rec_processed, created_by_id, updated_by_id) VALUES (1001, 105, 'ACTIVE', 'Salesforce', 'CRM', 164, 165, 104, 101, 1000000, 161, 161) , (1002, 105, 'ACTIVE', 'SAP Financials', 'Financials', 164, 165, 102, 102, 100000, 161, 161) , (1003, 105, 'ACTIVE', 'Payroll', 'Employee Payroll', 164, 165, 103, 102, 5000000, 161, 161) , (1004, 105, 'ACTIVE', 'Logistics', 'Distribution', 164, 165, 107, 102, 2000000, 161, 161) , (1005, 105, 'ACTIVE', 'Benefits', 'Employee Benefits', 164, 165, 101, 102, 100000, 161, 161) , (1006, 105, 'ACTIVE', 'Trading', 'Equity and Fixed Income', 164, 165, 106, 102, 10000000, 161, 161) , (1007, 105, 'ACTIVE', 'Fixed Income', 'Fixed Income', 164, 165, 106, 102, 5000000, 161, 161) , (1008, 105, 'ACTIVE', 'Equity', 'Equity', 164, 165, 106, 102, 100000000, 161, 161) , (1009, 105, 'ACTIVE', 'Rainking', 'Research', 164, 165, 109, 102, 5000000, 161, 161) , (1010, 105, 'ACTIVE', 'Pending Transaction', 'Payment', 164, 165, 102, 102, 5000000, 161, 161) ;
ALTER SEQUENCE systems_id_seq RESTART WITH 1024;
